spec_match.rationale: The demo clearly illustrates the mapping of AccentColor keywords to Highlight keywords under forced-colors media query.

interactive.rationale: Features a fully functional forced-colors simulator toggle and active media-query listeners for real-time detection.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligns with the feature's intent of demonstrating how CSS Color 4 system colors adapt to high-contrast modes.

edge_cases.rationale: Explicitly demonstrates and details the distinction between PWA standalone display-mode and normal web tabs.

references.rationale: Includes a direct link to the relevant ChromeStatus entry and MDN media forced-colors documentation.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to the design system, utilizing standard variables and maintaining proper contrast.

summary: An exceptionally thorough and high-quality demonstration of AccentColor's interaction with forced-colors mode, featuring real-time capability detection and visual simulation.
